title: Brownea neglecta
taxonomy: Brownea neglecta is classified in the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically in the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. Further classification places Brownea neglecta in the subfamily Faboideae, which is a large subfamily within the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Brownea, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The genus Brownea is a member of the larger clade known as Rosidae, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. Brownea neglecta is a species within the genus Brownea, and its classification is an important part of understanding its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
